title: A Free Quarren in the Palace: Tessek's Tale

The short story "'''A Free Quarren in the Palace: Tessek's Tale'''" by [[Dave Wolverton]] appeared in ''[[Tales from Jabba's Palace]]'', which was published [[December]] [[1995]] by [[Bantam Spectra]], and is about the [[Quarren/Legends|Quarren]] character [[Tessek/Legends|Tessek]].

==Plot summary==
The scheming [[Quarren/Legends|Quarren]] businessman [[Tessek/Legends|Tessek]] has plans to take over [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. He has bribed two [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Officer/Legends|officers]] to [[Death/Legends|kill]] both [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]] and [[Imperial Prefect]] [[Eugene Talmont]] during a raid on one of Jabba's warehouses. Afterwards, Tessek will install one of his officers as the new Prefect, giving Tessek the strings controlling the Galactic Empire on Tatooine. Meanwhile, Tessek would sell the criminal aspects of Jabba's Empire to his rival, [[Lady/Legends|Lady]] [[Valarian/Legends|Valarian]]. 

Tessek conspires with [[Barada/Legends|Barada]] to plant a [[Bomb/Legends|bomb]] on [[Bantha-II cargo skiff/Legends|Jabba's skiff]] and encourages the [[Gangster/Legends|gangster]] to take the skiff into the [[City/Legends|city]], but the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] is preoccupied with [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker's]] arrival at the [[Jabba's Palace/Legends|palace]]. Tessek reluctantly accompanies Jabba aboard his [[Sail barge/Legends|sail barge]] for the execution of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] interlopers at the [[Great Pit of Carkoon|Sarlacc pit]] and escapes the mayhem of the Rebel rescue on a [[Swooper/Legends|swoop bike]] he has secreted aboard the craft. But when Tessek returns to the palace, eager to carve out a place for himself in the power vacuum left by the Hutt's death, he is instead assailed by [[B'omarr Order|B'omarr monks]], who subdue him and transplant his [[Brain/Legends|brain]] into a jar.
